---
title: "Todd Cao - Lecturer in Marketing and Management"
image: "image/logo2.png"
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 15em
  links: 
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:caonhattuan@gmail.com
    - text: Resume
      icon: file-text
      href: ToddCao_Resume.pdf
    - text: Phone
      icon: phone
      href: tel:+84963436932
---

Welcome to my little world, Professors.

I am Tuan (Todd) Cao, a PhD in Management (Marketing) from the University of Southern Queensland, Australia, and a PhD in Business Administration from Open University, Vietnam. \\
Over the past four years, I have taught Fundamentals of Business and Management, Introduction to Public Relations, Crisis Management, Integrated Marketing Communications, Principles of Marketing, and Media Audience Research in English.

As an early-career research, My main focus is at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence and psychographics across marketing and organizational behavior. With 10 years working in the education business and 5 years as a lecturer, I believe I have many stories to enrich our café chitchat, Professors.

Outside academia, I am a marketing executive for several freelance projects, a business manager for F&B stores, and a guitarist with a love for dogs.

To break the distance, below is my video introduction. I know you are busy, Professors, but if you have a bit of interest in my résumé, just click the video and you will know what I look like. Thank you and see you.

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-GzopzdDp1w width=560 height=315 >}}
